name: Baked Sausage Cups & Scrambled Eggs
recipeIngredient: Quaker Oats, uncooked, 1/2 cup (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. For sausage cups, mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Press the mixture firmly into six 5-oz. ovenproof custard cups.
3. Place the custard cups in a shallow baking pan.
4. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350 F.) for about 45 minutes.
5. Unmold and drain on absorbent paper.
6. For eggs, melt butter in a large skillet over low heat.
7. Beat together eggs, salt, pepper, and milk until fluffy.
8. Pour the mixture into the skillet.
9. Cook, stirring lightly until the eggs are just barely set.
10. Arrange sausage cups around the eggs on a serving platter.
11. Garnish with parsley.
